page_builder.builder_error: The page builder could not load. Please use HTML mode instead.
page_builder.hint_design: Design a responsive web page with GrapesJS blocks, sections, forms, tabs, images and custom code.

page_builder.hint_plaintext: Write a simple text-only page. Line breaks are preserved when published.
page_builder.hint_richtext: Write and format a page with the rich text toolbar.

blocks.hero_body: Add a clear introduction that feels specific to your timebank.
blocks.feature_one_body: Describe an outcome, service or promise.
blocks.feature_two_body: Keep the copy concrete and easy to scan.

blocks.story_body: Use this for reports, programme explainers, partner pages or guidance.

starter.hero_body: Use sections, cards, images and calls to action to tell your tenant's story.
starter.card_one_body: Introduce projects, services, partners, reports, policies or local opportunities.
starter.card_two_body: Preview desktop, tablet and mobile while you design.

page_builder.switch_to_plain_warning: Switching to Plain text will remove page formatting and HTML from your content. This cannot be undone.
page_builder.switch_to_richtext_warning: Switching to Rich text will simplify your page HTML. Custom layout CSS, forms and unsupported tags may be removed.
page_builder.empty_inspector: Select an element on the page to edit its styles or settings.
page_builder.html_hint: Published exactly as written after page sanitisation.
